{
  "society_power": 7.8,
  "state_power": 8.5,
  "society_change": -1.0,
  "state_change": -1.4,
  "key_event": "Decline of Manufacturing and Political Centralization",
  "reasoning": "The decline of manufacturing weakened labor unions, and political centralization reduced local civil society power. State power was also somewhat diminished by European integration and economic liberalization."
}
